parameters.query: INSERT INTO booking_intents (provider_id, service_id, start_time, end_time, duration_minutes, customer_id, chat_id, user_id, event_title, idempotency_key, status, metadata) VALUES ($1::int, $2::int, $3::timestamptz, $4::timestamptz, $5::int, $6::text, $7::bigint, $8::bigint, $9::text, $10::text, 'PENDING', $11::jsonb) RETURNING id, created_at;
